content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto +1.23%, Realty +2.22%, Metal +1.34%, Pharma +1.08% all green; only IT red. VIX easing to 18.12 supports risk-on tone. Existing book benefiting with +1.11% day P&L; focus is trailing SLs on winners rather than fresh adds given heavy results-week binary risk and 47% already deployed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.8% winner. Stored SL 1038, raising marginally to 1040 to lock in clear profit while leaving room above support 1033. Q4 print already out (PAT +19% YoY, AUM +13%, dividend Rs 8); thesis intact, momentum strong. Trail-gap: SL 1040 vs CMP 1051 = ~1.0% buffer, acceptable. Note CEO transition risk a watch-item but operating numbers strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, -1.9% modest drawdown. SL 119 still ~3% below CMP. Hold as portfolio insurance against any post-results / geopolitical reversal. No SL change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+5.3% winner, CMP 1827 near 52-wk high 1851. Stored SL 1810 (+4.4% above entry, locking profit). No-op: stored SL already at 1810 — actually leaving as is. BUT: Q4 results due May 19-21 within max_hold_days window — binary event risk on a position now ~7% of capital. SL at 1810 sits 1% below CMP which gives almost no chop room; if SL trips on noise we still book +4.4%. Acceptable. Reasoning: keep tight SL given binary event window. Note: this is no-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+3.0%, CMP 483.15 just below R1 483.40. Stored SL 477.50, tightening marginally to 478 (above breakeven 469 by ~1.9%). Trail-gap: SL 478 vs CMP 483 = ~1% buffer, tight but justified given April production -9.7% YoY red flag. Q4 already out, dividend record date pending — let it run toward 495 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "+1.9% on ETF. SL 23.85 sits at -1.0% below CMP 24.10 — already at breakeven-plus. Pharma sector +1.08% today, Sun Pharma Organon deal supports. No-op MODIFY would be churn; SL is already where I'd put it."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.5% with strong intraday momentum (+2.85% day). Q4 print strong (PAT +23%, AUM crossed 5L cr). Raising SL from 940 to 944 (breakeven) — locks zero loss on the position. Target 990 (vs prior stored 985) gives R:R = (990-958.15)/(958.15-944) = 31.85/14.15 = 2.25 from current — well above 1.5 floor. Trail-gap: SL 944 vs CMP 958 = ~1.5% buffer."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1685.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% on first day, Q4 strong (PAT +9.4% YoY, FY26 cargo crossed 500MMT first ever). Stock just broke 52-wk high 1672 — now CMP 1707. Raising SL from 1675 to 1685 (still below entry 1700, so not breakeven yet but tighter). Trail-gap: SL 1685 vs CMP 1707 = ~1.3% buffer. Target 1790 unchanged; consensus TP 1833."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, CMP 1535 reverted from intraday high 1600. Q4 results May 14 within hold window — binary event. Position size small (~4.6% capital), SL 1490 (-3% below CMP) gives normal chop room. Tanker thesis intact (Brent $101, fleet expansion). No SL change; will reassess closer to May 14."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, CMP 13741 faded from intraday high 13976. April record dispatch (2.4L units), Auto sector +1.23% leader, Q4 already out. SL 13400 (-2.5% below CMP) appropriate; only 4 shares so ~5.4% capital. Hold and let momentum work."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in clear profit on +6.8% winner; thesis intact post-Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge; SL 119 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 already locks +4.4%; tight pre Q4 binary acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Locks profit above entry given April production miss red flag."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "reasoning": "Move to breakeven on strong Q4 momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1685.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten 10pts on 52-wk high breakout post Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1490 leaves room ahead of May 14 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Auto leadership intact; SL 13400 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL/HAL defence cluster strong but adding now would stack a second cap-goods/PSU-momentum name without conviction — pass. BAJAJ-AUTO +8% chase risk (gap-up after Q4 already passed). FLUOROCHEM +11% on Q4 May 13 binary — too rich pre-event. GODREJPROP results TODAY — wait for print, not entering blind. KOTAKBANK dividend cut overhang, watch for stabilization. Skip new entries today; book is already at 47% deployed across 9 names with several Q4 binaries (Sun May 19-21, GESHIP May 14, FLUOROCHEM May 13 if added) baked in.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day +1.11%, cumulative +0.87%. Book is well-distributed across Pharma (Sun+PharmaBees), Financials (PNBHOUSING+BAJFINANCE), Energy/Metal (CoalIndia), Services (AdaniPorts+GESHIP), Auto (Maruti), Hedge (GoldBees). Sector cap respected. Today's discipline: trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, COALINDIA, BAJFINANCE, ADANIPORTS — moves into breakeven-plus territory), hold the rest, no new entries. Three Q4 binary events embedded (GESHIP May 14, SUNPHARMA May 19-21) within hold windows — will reassess sizing/SL closer to dates. Cash buffer 53% — comfortable above 20% floor, intentional reserve given results-week earnings density."
}
